verses.text: Five kings unite against Gibeon for making peace with Israel. Alliance. The south rallies to war.
Five kings unite against Gibeon for making peace with Israel. Alliance. The south rallies to war.
Five kings unite against Gibeon for making peace with Israel. Alliance. The south rallies to war.
Five kings unite against Gibeon for making peace with Israel. Alliance. The south rallies to war.
Five kings unite against Gibeon for making peace with Israel. Alliance. The south rallies to war.
Gibeon pleads, and Joshua marches up to help. Help. He keeps his oath.
Gibeon pleads, and Joshua marches up to help. Help. He keeps his oath.
God says, 'Fear them not,' and routs them. Routed. The LORD fights for Israel.
God says, 'Fear them not,' and routs them. Routed. The LORD fights for Israel.
God says, 'Fear them not,' and routs them. Routed. The LORD fights for Israel.
God casts great hailstones, killing more than the sword. Hail. Heaven joins the battle.
'Sun, stand thou still'; the LORD hearkened to a man. Sun stilled. God answers an extraordinary prayer.
'Sun, stand thou still'; the LORD hearkened to a man. Sun stilled. God answers an extraordinary prayer.
'Sun, stand thou still'; the LORD hearkened to a man. Sun stilled. God answers an extraordinary prayer.
The five kings flee and hide in a cave at Makkedah. Hidden. The kings cower.
The five kings flee and hide in a cave at Makkedah. Hidden. The kings cower.
The five kings flee and hide in a cave at Makkedah. Hidden. The kings cower.
The five kings flee and hide in a cave at Makkedah. Hidden. The kings cower.
Joshua bids pursue; the people return in peace. Pursued. The victory is followed up.
Joshua bids pursue; the people return in peace. Pursued. The victory is followed up.
Joshua bids pursue; the people return in peace. Pursued. The victory is followed up.
The kings are brought out; the captains set feet on their necks. Subdued. The foe is humbled.
The kings are brought out; the captains set feet on their necks. Subdued. The foe is humbled.
The kings are brought out; the captains set feet on their necks. Subdued. The foe is humbled.
Joshua slays and hangs them till evening. Hanged. The enemies fall.
Joshua slays and hangs them till evening. Hanged. The enemies fall.
Joshua slays and hangs them till evening. Hanged. The enemies fall.
Makkedah and Libnah are taken. Taken. City after city falls.
Makkedah and Libnah are taken. Taken. City after city falls.
Makkedah and Libnah are taken. Taken. City after city falls.
Lachish and Eglon are taken. Conquest. The south is subdued.
Lachish and Eglon are taken. Conquest. The south is subdued.
Lachish and Eglon are taken. Conquest. The south is subdued.
Lachish and Eglon are taken. Conquest. The south is subdued.
Lachish and Eglon are taken. Conquest. The south is subdued.
Hebron and Debir are smitten. Smitten. None resists.
Hebron and Debir are smitten. Smitten. None resists.
Hebron and Debir are smitten. Smitten. None resists.
Hebron and Debir are smitten. Smitten. None resists.
Joshua smites all the south, for 'the LORD God of Israel fought for Israel.' All subdued. God gives the victory.
